title: Thora van Deken
writer: Sam Ask, John W. Brunius, Henrik Pontoppidan
actors: Pauline Brunius, Hugo Björne, Jessie Wessel
plot: A divorced woman takes matters into her own hands and destroys her late ex-husband's will, to ensure that their daughter receives her rightful inheritance. Will her efforts be for naught? Based on "Lille Rødhætte" by Henrik Pontop...
